_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: We also tested the selumetinib + digoxin combination in an MPNST PDX grown in NRG mice. In the PDX, an increase in survival and reduction in tumor growth was also observed, although it was not as robust as the response seen in the GEMM or MPNST cell line xenograft
details: Selumetinib + digoxin combination showed increase in survival and reduction in tumor growth, though not as robust as in GEMM or cell line xenograft
